content.problemStatement:
Write a program to output the squares (using multiplication) of numbers from 1 to 5 on separate lines.

[**Note:** Please print in the same format as given below. There are single spaces between hyphen(-) and digits.]
content.outputFormat: Print the squares of numbers from 1 to 5, each on a separate line in the format "i - i*i" (single space before and after the hyphen).

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints each integer i from 1 to 5 followed by its square i*i, separated by a hyphen with spaces.

solution.approach: The task is to output a fixed sequence. Iterate i from 1 to 5 and print i followed by a hyphen and its square. The algorithm runs in constant time because the range is fixed. A dummy test‑case loop (T = 1) is kept to satisfy the requirement of looping over test cases.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – only five iterations are performed.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few integer variables are used.
